Owlee simplifies teaching processes, ena: Owlee simplifies teaching processes, enabling educators to efficiently manage classes and materials
Owlee is a user - friendly Learning Mana: Owlee is a user - friendly Learning Management System(LMS) designed specifically for independent educators, tutors, and small training businesses.It provides an all - in - one platform to simplify course management, enhance student engagement.With Owlee, educators can efficiently manage their courses anytime, anywhere through a responsive mobile interface, ensuring seamless access to lesson planning, student tracking, and material distribution. By automating administrative tasks, Owlee helps educators save valuable time and resources, allowing them to focus more on delivering high - quality learning experiences.
Enhancing the overall learning experienc: Enhancing the overall learning experience for both educators and students.
Plan and organize lessons with an intuit: Plan and organize lessons with an intuitive scheduling system, ensuring students stay updated with class timings.
Easily track student progress, attendanc: Easily track student progress, attendance, and performance through a centralized dashboard.
Upload, organize, and distribute learnin: Upload, organize, and distribute learning resources, including PDFs, videos, and interactive content.

Owlee is a dual-integrated EdTech ecosys: Owlee is a dual-integrated EdTech ecosystem designed to transform independent tutoring into a professional, scalable business by combining an intuitive LMS workspace with a student-facing marketplace. Our platform empowers educators to automate administrative friction and manage both Private and Public courses through a responsive mobile interface, while providing students with a centralized platform to discover high-quality learning. We offer tailored solutions, including unlimited private courses, targeted public marketplace listings, and dedicated material storage to help teachers eliminate chaos, focus on student outcomes, and turn their expertise into a thriving business.
